contract_summary: Destroys an auxiliary device by first removing it from the subsystem (auxiliary_device_delete) and then releasing the initial reference with a put (auxiliary_device_uninit). After this call, the caller must not access the device. This function represents the final release stage of the auxiliary device lifecycle.
